ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DANFOURA LAW, P.C. AS TO DEFENDANT ZI CHENG, LLC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-24-2021 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-24-2021 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF DANFORURA LAW IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM REPRESENTED BY CHRIS DEWYS, DIRECTOR. DEFENDANT ZI CHENG, LLC IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY HENRY CHENG. PLAINTIFF NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-24-2021 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DANFOURA LAW, P.C. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ZI CHENG, LLC. $4,095.05 PRINCIPAL, $160.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,255.05, DEFENDANT LLC STATUS WAS SUSPENDED AT THE DATE OF THIS HEARING. PER CCC 2205 AND CASE LAW, DEFENDANT LLC CANNOT DEFEND ITSELF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
